metadata.description: JEG Claude Marketplace — Community plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: cc-cnf-sync
plugins.description: Backup and restore Claude Code configuration, with per-project memory kept in continuous two-way sync across machines/OS via SessionStart/SessionEnd hooks (conflict-safe: divergent notes are never lost). Backed by a private GitHub repository, fully portable across Linux, macOS and Windows. Run /setup after installing.
